messages.content: On Paper 1.20.6, how would you implement a packet-only NPC with a real skin, per-viewer visibility, and click handling, without spawning a Bukkit entity or using Citizens or ProtocolLib?

Treat the NPC as a viewer-scoped illusion backed by your own registry. Create a ServerPlayer with a GameProfile and skin texture properties, send the player info, spawn, metadata, equipment, and rotation packets only to selected viewers, then remove the temporary tab-list entry after a short delay. To handle clicks, intercept inbound interact packets on the player connection, compare the entity id against your packet NPC registry, and dispatch your own callback. Re-send the packet set on join, respawn, chunk resend, and world change because Bukkit will not persist this fake entity for you.
Paper 1.20.6'ya gectikten sonra eski NMS kodum NoSuchMethodError ile patliyor. Acik bir GUI'nin basligini oyuncunun envanterini kapatmadan nasil guncellemeliyim?

Eski obfuscated paket ve constructor isimleri yerine Mojang mappings kullanan modern Paper akisini kullanmalisin. Oyuncunun mevcut container nesnesini alip ayni container id ve menu type ile yeni basligi iceren open screen paketini gonder, ardindan menu state'ini tekrar senkronize et. Bu yaklasim sandik benzeri gercek container menulerinde calisir; oyuncunun kendi survival envanterinde baslik degistirme destegi beklememelisin. Eski v1_x_Ry importlarini ve reflection tabanli isim cozumlerini birakman, benzer kirilmalari azaltir.

What is a robust way to build a paginated Paper inventory GUI with search, admin actions, and safe click handling that prevents shift-click, number-key swaps, double-click collection, and drag duplication?

Build the menu around a dedicated session object keyed by player UUID and identified by a custom holder or another server-side marker, not by title parsing. Store immutable view state such as page, filter, and selected category in that session, render only the top inventory, and route every click through fixed slot-to-action mappings. In InventoryClickEvent, use raw slot checks to separate top and bottom inventories, cancel unsafe click types such as shift-click, number-key, double-click, collect-to-cursor, and offhand swap, and handle InventoryDragEvent by cancelling any drag that touches GUI slots. Re-render the whole page when state changes instead of mutating random slots ad hoc.

Paper uzerinde MySQL'den async veri cekip GUI guncelliyorum ama bazen oyuncu sayfa degistirdikten sonra eski sorgu sonuclari yeni menuyu eziyor. CompletableFuture ve HikariCP ile bunu nasil guvenli hale getiririm?

Veritabani isini sadece async executor tarafinda yap, fakat GUI uygulamasini her zaman ana thread veya uygun scheduler baglaminda tamamla. Her menu acilisinda ve her filtre ya da sayfa degisiminde oyuncuya ait bir revision numarasi uret, bu revision degerini async gorevin icine tasiyip sonuc dondugunde mevcut revision ile karsilastir. Oyuncu offline ise, ayni menu acik degilse veya revision eslesmiyorsa sonucu tamamen yok say. Boylece HikariCP ile verimli sorgu calisirken eski future'lar yeni GUI state'ini bozamaz.

My plugin has multiple EntityDeathEvent listeners across arena, economy, and quest modules, and players sometimes get paid twice or not at all. How do I debug event priority and cancellation order correctly?

Start by treating event flow as deterministic rather than random. Bukkit processes priorities from LOWEST through MONITOR, and MONITOR should remain observational only. Choose one authoritative payout listener, set ignoreCancelled appropriately, and make the reward idempotent by marking a combat key as processed before paying. Then audit registration paths to ensure a listener is not being registered twice on reload or arena enable, because duplicate registration often looks like a priority bug even when the real problem is lifecycle management.

Surekli AsyncCatcher hatalari aliyorum; ozellikle async thread icinde teleport, blok okuma ve entity islemi yaptigimda Asynchronous entity world add veya benzeri loglar dusuyor. Performansi bozmadan bunu nasil duzeltirim?

Async thread'i sadece veri erisimi, JSON parse, hesaplama ve benzeri saf isler icin kullanmalisin; dunya ve entity mutasyonlari canli world state ile calistigi icin guvenli degildir. Teleport, getBlockAt, spawn, scoreboard, inventory ve entity tracker gibi islemleri daima ana thread veya Folia kullaniyorsan ilgili player ya da region scheduler'ina tasimalisin. Eger async tarafta blok verisine ihtiyacin varsa canli world yerine guvenli snapshot yapilari kullan. Kural nettir: veri async olabilir, dunya mutasyonu olmaz.
For a custom guard zombie on modern Spigot or Paper, what is the least painful way to implement patrol points, line-of-sight aggro, and chase behavior while staying maintainable across minor updates?

Keep your gameplay rules version-agnostic and isolate direct NMS calls behind a very small adapter layer. The patrol state machine, aggro checks, and route memory should live in plain Java classes, while the adapter is responsible only for wiring goals, navigation, and target selectors to the server version you are compiling against. Use Mojang-mapped development tooling so names stay readable, and persist guard metadata such as patrol waypoints and mode in Bukkit-side storage like PersistentDataContainer. This approach dramatically reduces the amount of code that must change when internal server AI APIs shift.
Spigot veya Paper'da bir entity'yi sadece belirli oyunculara farkli glow renkleriyle gostermek istiyorum. Global scoreboard davranisini bozmadan oyuncuya ozel outline sistemi nasil kurulur?

Bu islem icin iki parcayi oyuncu bazli yonetmelisin: entity metadata icindeki glowing flag ve rengin belirlendigi scoreboard team atamasi. Her viewer icin ayri bir gorunum registrysi tut, glow gormesi gereken oyuncuya metadata paketi ile glowing bitini gonder ve ayni viewer icin uygun renkli team paketini yolla. Diger oyuncular icin ya farkli team rengi kullan ya da hic glow uygulama. Join, respawn, world degisimi ve tracker refresh gibi durumlarda bu viewer-scoped state'i yeniden uygulamazsan istemci goruntusu bozulur.
My Paper plugin throws ClassCastException or LinkageError involving shaded HikariCP or Adventure classes when other plugins bundle the same libraries. What is the correct fix?

The real issue is classloader ownership, not bad luck. If a dependency is provided by the platform, mark it as provided and do not bundle it. If it is your private dependency, shade and relocate it into your own namespace so no other plugin can collide with it. Also avoid exposing relocated library types in your public plugin API, because downstream plugins cannot safely interact with your private relocated classes. One library should have one ownership model; mixing provided and bundled usage creates the worst conflicts.
Folia'ya gecerken eski BukkitRunnable ve tek main thread varsayimlarim bozuldu. Async veritabani sonucundan oyuncuya GUI acmak veya region tabanli dunya islemi yapmak icin Folia-safe yaklasim nedir?

Folia'da dusunmen gereken sey genel bir main thread degil, hedefe bagli scheduler baglamidir. Oyuncuya GUI acmak veya mesaj gondermek icin player scheduler, belirli koordinatlardaki blok ve entity mutasyonlari icin region scheduler kullanmalisin. Async veritabani sonucu alman dogrudur, ancak sonucu dogrudan Bukkit API'ye uygulamak yerine ilgili oyuncu veya region baglamina geri planlaman gerekir. Veri toplama ile dunya mutasyonunu ayirdigin anda eski Paper aliskanliklarindan kaynaklanan cogu hata kaybolur.
In Fabric 1.20.1, I want to remove the vanilla anvil level cap without copying the whole screen handler. Is a Mixin the right tool, and what injection style is least fragile?

Yes, this is a strong Mixin use case because the cap is embedded in vanilla logic and you usually only need to replace a constant or a narrow branch. A constant modification inside the anvil result update path is typically less fragile than capturing local variables or overwriting the whole method. That keeps the rest of the vanilla logic intact, including rename costs and material cost handling. The most important operational detail is version alignment: compile and run against matching mappings and loader versions, or even a correct Mixin can appear broken.

Fabric tarafinda InvalidMixinException ve Cannot resolve method in target class hatalari aliyorum. Dev ortaminda calisan Mixin export edilen jar'da sunucuda neden patlar ve bunu nasil debug etmeliyim?

En yaygin neden named mappings ile runtime isimleri arasindaki uyumsuzluktur. Dev ortaminda gordugun method adi named olabilir, ancak uretimde Mixin'in refmap yardimiyla bunu dogru runtime ismine cevirmesi gerekir; refmap eksik veya bozuksa hedef method bulunamaz. Ayni Minecraft, Loader ve Yarn surumleriyle derlediginden emin ol, refmap dosyasinin gercekten jar icine girdigini kontrol et ve vanilla siniflari hedeflerken yanlislikla remap kapatma. Ayrica lambda ve synthetic hedeflerden kacinmak, uzun vadede cok daha dayanikli injection noktalarina goturur.

How should I register a Fabric machine block with a BlockEntity, inventory, progress sync, and a screen handler while keeping the server authoritative and the client UI consistent after relog or chunk unload?

Register the block, its item, the block entity type, and the screen handler type during common initialization, and keep every mutable machine field inside the BlockEntity rather than inside the screen. The screen should be a view over server state, never the owner of that state. Use simple sync channels such as property delegates for compact integer values like progress and mode, and send targeted packets for richer data only when needed. When the chunk unloads or the player relogs, rebuild the UI entirely from serialized BlockEntity state so the client never becomes the authority.
Fabric modumda bazen Registry is already frozen hatasi aliyorum. Ozellikle item veya block kaydini world tick sirasinda ya da lazy singleton icinde yaptigimda patliyor. Dogru lifecycle nedir?

Bu hata, registry kaydini oyun bootstrap asamasi tamamlandiktan sonra yapmaya calistigini gosterir. Block, item, entity, screen handler ve benzeri tum register islemleri ortak init asamasinda, yani ModInitializer icinde deterministik sekilde tamamlanmalidir. Tick, command, screen acilisi veya singleton'in ilk kullanimi kayit zamani degildir. Gec yuklenmesi gereken sey kaydin kendisi degil, kaydedilen nesnenin veri bagimliliklariysa bunlari sonradan doldur; registry'yi geciktirme.
I am building a Fabric ability system with a dash keybind. What is the correct C2S and S2C packet flow so the client cannot spoof movement or bypass cooldowns?

Treat the client packet as a request for permission, not as a completed action. The client should send only a small intent payload such as the ability id and optional direction, then the server handler must switch to the server thread, validate the held item, cooldown, world rules, status effects, and range constraints, and apply the dash itself. After the server writes the new cooldown into authoritative player data, it can send a compact S2C update so the HUD shows the remaining cooldown. The client should never decide the final position, distance, or cooldown duration.

Fabric modum dedicated server'da acilirken NoClassDefFoundError veriyor; ortak item veya entity sinifimin icinde MinecraftClient, screen veya keybind referanslari var. Client-only kodu tamamen ayirmak icin nasil bir yapi kurmaliyim?

Sunucuda yuklenen her ortak sinif, net.minecraft.client siniflari hic yokmus gibi guvenli olmak zorundadir. Bu nedenle item, block, entity, packet ve gameplay mantigi common tarafta kalmali; renderer, screen, keybind, HUD ve client event abonelikleri yalnizca ClientModInitializer icinde kaydedilmelidir. Ortak siniflarin static alanlari, method imzalari, nested class'lari ve lambda referanslari bile istemci tiplerini tasiyorsa dedicated server yine patlar. Dogru ayirim, sadece kodu tasimak degil, referans zincirini de tamamen temizlemektir.
I need a Fabric structure wand that previews a multi-block placement ghost on the client but still requires the server to authorize the final placement. How should the network design work?

Split preview from final mutation. The client can request a preview candidate based on its current aim and rotation, but the server should validate the anchor position, loaded chunks, permissions, and cost before returning a normalized placement snapshot. The client renders that snapshot as a ghost only. When the player confirms placement, it sends a second request that references the approved preview, and the server revalidates the state before placing blocks. This keeps the UX responsive while making the server the only authority that can create structures.

Fabric tarafinda enerji tutan ozel bir item yaptim ve screen handler'da enerji, mod ve cooldown gosteriyorum. Ancak ItemStack NBT bazen client tarafinda eski kaliyor ve ekran yeniden acilinca desync oluyor. Dogru model ne olmali?

Kritik state'i istemci kopyasinda degil, sunucu tarafindaki gercek ItemStack uzerinde tutmalisin. Ekran acilirken sunucu o anki enerji, mod ve cooldown bilgisini acilis verisiyle veya uygun sync mekanizmasiyla client'a gonderir. Kullanici butona bastiginda client sadece istek yollar; NBT veya component verisi sunucuda guncellenir ve ardindan degisen alanlar client'a tekrar senkronize edilir. Relog, slot degisimi veya ekranin yeniden acilmasi durumunda tek dogru kaynak sunucu oldugu icin desync ciddi oranda azalir.
On modern Forge, what is the clean registration pipeline for a custom flying mob with a spawn egg, renderer, attributes, and biome spawning, without relying on old RegistryEvent patterns?

Use DeferredRegister for every registrable type and keep object access lazy through RegistryObject. Register the entity type, spawn egg, and any related items in the mod constructor by attaching the DeferredRegister instances to the mod event bus. Bind attributes in EntityAttributeCreationEvent, register the renderer in the client-only setup path, and handle spawn placement or biome hooks in the correct common setup or biome event for your target version. This pattern avoids early access crashes and keeps classloading side-safe.
Forge'da RegistryObject not present hatasi aliyorum. Genelde static field initializer icinde veya constructor'da RegistryObject.get cagiriyorum. Mimari seviyede bunu nasil duzeltirim?

RegistryObject'u hazir nesne gibi degil, gec cozulmesi gereken bir Supplier gibi dusunmelisin. Kayit tamamlanmadan get cagirirsan hata kacinilmazdir; bu nedenle static initializer, constructor ve enum baslangiclari icinde dogrudan get kullanma. Nesneyi sadece oyun yasam dongusunde gercekten gerektiginde cozmeli veya event tabanli kurulumlarda uygun zamana ertelemelisin. Kayit asamasi ile kullanim asamasini net ayirdiginda bu hata tamamen ortadan kalkar.
How do I build a safe Forge SimpleChannel packet layer for a machine GUI where the client clicks buttons, the server mutates a block entity, and the updated state returns to the screen?

Keep packets tiny and directional, and keep gameplay logic out of the networking layer itself. A button click packet should carry only the block position and an action id, and the handler should first validate logical side, then enqueue work onto the proper server thread before touching world state. The server must check that the player still has the correct menu open, that the block entity still exists and is in range, and that the action is allowed. After mutation, send either compact data-slot updates or a targeted state packet rather than blasting full NBT every tick.
Forge'da oyuncuya mana sistemi ekliyorum. Olunce ve dimension degistirince veri kaybolmamali, HUD ve spell sistemi de ayni capability'yi kullanmali. Dogru capability tasarimi nasil olmalı?

Mana gibi oyuncu state'i icin capability dogru secimdir ama tum yasam dongusunu eksiksiz kurman gerekir. Oyuncuya capability'yi attach et, veriyi NBT ile serialize et ve PlayerEvent.Clone sirasinda eski oyuncudan yeni oyuncuya kontrollu sekilde kopyala. Sunucu mana degerinin tek otoritesi olmali; HUD ve spell sistemi ayni capability'den okumali, paralel state tutmamalidir. Client senkronizasyonu da paketlerle sunucudan gelmeli ki olum, yeniden giris ve dimension degisimi sonrasi veri tutarli kalsin.
I need to sync a large Forge player capability, such as a skill tree, without sending huge NBT blobs every tick. When should I send full snapshots and when should I send diffs?

Use full snapshots only at lifecycle boundaries such as login, respawn, dimension change, and when another player starts tracking the entity. After that, send compact diff packets only when a node unlocks, points change, or another relevant mutation actually occurs. This shifts the system from polling to event-driven synchronization and cuts both bandwidth and CPU overhead. The best place to emit diffs is from the mutation code path itself, because then you never need to guess whether something changed.

Forge packet handler icinde GUI widget'larini veya Minecraft state'ini guncelledigimde bazen Not on render thread tarzi hatalar aliyorum. Netty thread ile client thread ayrimini pratikte nasil yonetmeliyim?

Agi paketini decode ettigin thread ile oyunun GUI veya render state'ini guvenle degistirebilecegin thread ayni degildir. Bu yuzden packet handler icinde dogrudan ekran widget'i, render state'i veya Minecraft singleton'ini mutate etmemelisin. Handler once dogru tarafi dogrular, sonra isi client ana yurumesine veya render-safe baglama planlar; widget guncellemeleri ve gorsel degisiklikler ancak orada yapilir. Network thread'i yalnizca veri cozumleme ve yonlendirme icin kullanildiginda bu hata kategorisi kaybolur.
What is the safest strategy for using Mixins in a modern Forge modpack where other mods may target the same methods and InvalidInjectionException happens intermittently?

Start by reducing the number of Mixins you need at all; if an event, capability, or extension point can solve the problem, prefer that. When a Mixin is unavoidable, choose narrow Inject hooks over Redirect or Overwrite whenever possible, target the smallest stable slice of bytecode you can, and avoid synthetic or compiler-generated structures. In debugging, inspect which other mods touch the same methods, verify that the target bytecode shape actually matches your expected version, and design the feature to degrade safely if an optional injection point cannot be found. The biggest compatibility win comes from being less invasive.
Forge'da PlayerEvent.Clone, reviveCaps ve invalidation sirasini karistiriyorum. Bazen capability verisi kayboluyor, bazen de iki kere kopyalaniyor. Dogru olum sonrasi akis ne olmali?

Olumden sonra eski player instance'i gider ve yeni biri gelir; bu nedenle capability verisini tek bir kontrollu noktada kopyalamalisin. Clone event sirasinda eski capability'yi guvenli sekilde okunabilir hale getir, yeni oyuncuya yalnizca bir kez aktar ve eski referanslari yasatacak stale baglantilardan kacin. Ayrica yeni oyuncu authoritative hale geldikten sonra ikinci bir kopyalama veya gelisiguzel tekrar sync yapma; bu genelde iki kez uygulama sorununa yol acar. Kural, tek kopyalama noktasi ve net sahipliktir.
How can I build a pure Skript chest GUI without TuSKe or other GUI addons, while keeping independent per-player page state and preventing clicks in the bottom inventory from triggering actions?

Model the menu as a normal chest inventory plus a separate server-side session tree keyed by player UUID. Store page, filter, and current context in that session tree, render fixed slot-to-action mappings into the top inventory, and in inventory click handling first verify that the open view belongs to your GUI before routing any action. Use raw slot checks so clicks in the player inventory are ignored unless you explicitly support them, and always clean up the temporary session tree on close or quit. The menu becomes deterministic because the visual inventory is only a projection of your stored state.
Skript ile yaptigim leaderboard veya claim sisteminde binlerce degisken uzerinde loop dondugum icin menu acilislari cok yavas. Nested loop ve global variable erisimini nasil optimize etmeliyim?

Performansi yukselten temel strateji, hesaplamayi erisim anindan veri degisim anina tasimaktir. Her menu acilisinda tum kayitlari bastan taramak yerine, ozet listeleri veya siralamalari veri degistiginde onceden guncelle ve sik kullanilan global degisken yollarini loop basinda local variable'lara cek. Ic ice donguler yerine once aday kumesini indeks veya on filtre ile daralt, sonra kucuk bir listede islem yap. Bu yaklasim saf Skript'te bile ciddi lag azalmasi saglar.
I am writing a Java addon for Skript and want script authors to use syntax like on quest complete. What do I need beyond firing a normal Bukkit event?

You need three separate pieces. First, define and fire a proper Bukkit event with HandlerList and strongly typed getters. Second, register the Skript event syntax so the parser knows that a phrase like on quest complete maps to your Java event class. Third, register event values so scripts can access the player, quest id, rewards, or any custom payload from the fired event. Many addon developers stop at callEvent, but Skript needs the full bridge between syntax and runtime data.
Skript projemde GUI oturumlari, combat state'leri ve cooldown degiskenleri zamanla birikiyor. Variable leak sorununu sistematik olarak nasil cozerim?

Gecici state'i oyuncu adi veya player object yerine UUID tabanli tek bir kok agaci altinda tut ve her veri turu icin net temizleme kurali belirle. GUI state'i inventory close ve quit olaylarinda, combat state'i logout veya timeout aninda, cooldown verisi ise bitis zamani gecince temizlenmeli ya da uzerine yazilmalidir. on quit, on kick, on inventory close ve plugin disable gibi tum cikis yuzeylerinde ayni kok agaci topluca temizlersen sızınti riski ciddi bicimde azalir. Gerekiyorsa periyodik bakim goreviyle suresi gecmis girdileri buda.
How do I redesign a Skript region enter and exit detector so it does not loop every player over every region every second?

Move the system from brute-force polling to movement-driven delta checks. Cache each player's last known region or chunk key, update that cache only when the player crosses a meaningful boundary, and compare the previous key with the new key to detect entry and exit. Regions themselves should be indexed by chunk or another coarse bucket so each movement event only checks a small candidate set rather than every region on the server. This changes the algorithmic cost from full scans to localized updates.

Saf Skript chest GUI'mde sadece click event iptal etmek yetmiyor; oyuncular drag, number key, shift-click veya hopper benzeri yollarla menuye item sokabiliyor. Tam koruma icin hangi yuzeyleri birlikte dusunmeliyim?

GUI guvenligini tek event uzerinden dusunmek yanlistir; tum tasima yuzeylerini birlikte ele almalisin. Inventory click tarafinda shift-click, number key, collect-to-cursor, offhand swap ve alt envanterden gelen hareketleri filtrele; inventory drag tarafinda ise temas edilen slotlardan biri bile GUI icindeyse islemi iptal et. Eger menu blok tabanli bir container ile iliskiliyse hopper gibi otomatik aktarim yollarini da ayrica kapatman gerekir. Top inventory'nin server-side bir projection oldugunu korudugun surece exploit alani ciddi bicimde daralir.
I want to log modern Paper chat to a database and add moderation tags without flattening components into legacy text. How should I handle AsyncChatEvent safely?

Treat AsyncChatEvent as an async data event whose payload is a Component, not a preformatted legacy string. Serialize the component into a storage-friendly format such as JSON or MiniMessage, store it asynchronously together with metadata like sender UUID, audience scope, and moderation tags, and only schedule back to the main thread if you truly need Bukkit side effects. Do not mix async-safe persistence with unsafe world mutations in the same callback. By preserving the component form, you avoid losing hover, style, and modern formatting context.
Buyuk bir Paper plugin'inde combat, economy, quest ve GUI modulleri eventlerle birbirine dolandi. Daha temiz bir moduler yapi icin event ve servis sorumluluklarini nasil ayirmaliyim?

Is kurallari servis katmanlarinda, bildirimler ise event katmaninda yasanmalidir. Combat, economy ve quest gibi alanlari once net servis arayuzlerine ayir; bu servisler dogrulanmis islemleri yapip isterse dusuk bagimli domain event'ler yayinlasin. GUI katmani bu servisleri tuketsin ama is kurali sahibi olmasin. Async katman da yalnizca I/O ve saf hesaplama icin kullanilsin; Bukkit state'ine dokunan kisim uygun scheduler baglamina donsun. Bu ayrim event spagettisini buyuk oranda temizler.
How can I animate an open Paper GUI title with progress updates without closing and reopening the inventory from the player's perspective?

For supported container menus, resend the open-screen packet using the same container id and menu type but with a new title component, then immediately rebroadcast the menu state so the client stays synchronized. From the player's perspective the menu remains open, yet the title changes. Avoid updating the title every tick; a coarser cadence is enough for progress indicators and reduces packet noise. If slot contents also change, update the title and slots from the same synchronization point to prevent visual desync.

Spigot veya Paper'da gercek bir koylu spawn etmeden oyuncuya sahte villager trade arayuzu acmak istiyorum. Bazi oyuncular farkli fiyat gormeli ve tum guvenlik sunucu tarafinda kalmali. Dogru tasarim ne olur?

Bu senaryoda entity degil, oyuncuya ozel sanal bir merchant oturumu tasarlamalisin. Trade teklifleri, kullanim sayaci ve fiyatlandirma tamamen sunucu tarafindaki bu oturum nesnesinde tutulur; istemciye yalnizca merchant arayuzunun gorsel hali acilir. Oyuncu satin alma denemesi yaptiginda gosterilen fiyata guvenmek yerine sunucu kendi merchant state'i uzerinden stok, izin ve guncel fiyat kontrolu yapar. Boylece gercek bir koyluye ihtiyac duymadan oyuncu bazli fiyatlandirma ve guvenli trade akisi saglanir.
I used a Fabric Redirect Mixin to replace a vanilla sound call, and now I get recursion or bizarre side effects because the redirected path hits the same logic again. When should Redirect be avoided?

Redirect is powerful but fragile because it replaces a specific invocation at the bytecode level, which makes self-recursion easy if the replacement path re-enters the same call chain. For most gameplay tweaks, a simple Inject before or after the target call, or a cancellable Inject around the method, is safer and more compatible with other mods. Use Redirect only when you truly need to replace one exact invocation and you fully understand the downstream call graph. If you keep Redirect, ensure the replacement path never reaches the original call site again.
Fabric tarafinda Shadow field was not located hatasi aliyorum. Hedef sinif dev ortaminda dogru gorunuyor ama uretimde shadow edilen alan bulunamiyor. Bunu nasil dusunmeliyim?

Bu hata genelde mapping zincirinin veya hedef seciminin bozuk oldugunu gosterir. Dev ortaminda gordugun ad named mapping adidir; uretimde Mixin'in refmap ile bunu dogru runtime ismine cevirmesi gerekir. Refmap eksikse, yanlis surumle derlendiysen veya shadow edilen alan aslinda synthetic, inherited ya da farkli bytecode yapisinda ise cozumleme basarisiz olur. Dolayisiyla ayni surumleri kullan, gercek hedefin dogrudan o class'ta var oldugunu dogrula ve compiler tarafindan uretilmis yapilari shadow etmeye calismaktan kacin.
How should I structure a Forge machine block entity that exposes item, energy, and fluid capabilities, saves correctly, and syncs only necessary fields to the client?

Keep the machine's authoritative state inside the block entity and expose each subsystem through its own internal storage plus LazyOptional wrappers. Invalidate those LazyOptionals when the block entity is removed so other mods cannot keep stale references. Serialize the storages into NBT for saving, call setChanged whenever mutations matter for persistence, and use menu data slots or compact packets for client sync instead of sending full NBT every tick. The menu should only validate access and reflect block entity state, not own the machine logic itself.

Paper GUI itemlerimde buton kimligini display name veya lore parse ederek sakliyorum, ama dil ve format degisince tiklama mantigi kiriliyor. PersistentDataContainer ile daha saglam bir tasarim nasil kurulur?

Gorsel metinleri is mantiginin kimligi olarak kullanmak yerine action id, payload ve gerekirse schema version gibi alanlari ItemMeta icindeki PersistentDataContainer'a yaz. Tiklama event'i geldiginde once bu metadata alanlarini oku, sonra ilgili menu handler'ina yonlendir; display name ve lore yalnizca kullanici deneyimi icin kalsin. Bu sayede ceviri, renk, satir duzeni veya lore formatinda degisiklik olsa bile GUI mantigi bozulmaz. Ayrica metin parse etmedigin icin kod hem daha hizli hem de bakimi daha kolay hale gelir.
How can I hide or show nametags per viewer on Spigot or Paper for a stealth system where allies still see each other but enemies do not?

This is fundamentally a viewer-scoped scoreboard problem. Maintain team or packet state per viewer so one player can receive a visible nametag configuration for an ally while another player receives a hidden nametag configuration for the same target. Reapply that state on join, respawn, world change, vanish toggles, and team changes because tracker refreshes can reset the illusion. If you mutate only one global scoreboard, you will not get true per-viewer behavior.

Custom crafting GUI'mde recipe matrix degistikce sonucu anlik hesapliyorum ve tarifleri async veritabanina yaziyorum. Bazen sonuc slotu desync oluyor, bazen de menu kapandiginda null pointer aliyorum. Guvenli akis nedir?

Canli crafting sonucu yalnizca ana thread'de, o andaki inventory matrix'in immutable snapshot'i uzerinden hesaplanmalidir. Asenkron kayit icin once recipe verisini saf bir veri nesnesine donustur, sonra bu nesneyi future tarafinda sakla; async tarafta asla canli Inventory, Player veya slot referanslari tutma. Menu kapandiginda artik GUI state'ine dokunma, sadece daha once alinmis snapshot ile calis. Bu ayirim hem sonuc slotu desync'ini hem de kapanis sirasindaki null pointer riskini ciddi bicimde azaltir.
How do I load large structure definitions from a database asynchronously in Paper, then place blocks or spawn display entities without freezing the server or violating thread rules?

Divide the workflow into three stages: async data load, chunk readiness, and world application. Fetch and deserialize the structure data asynchronously because that part is pure I/O and CPU work, then ensure the target chunks are prepared using the server's supported async-aware loading path. Actual block placement and entity spawning must still happen on the correct game thread or region scheduler, ideally in batches over multiple ticks so the server stays responsive. Keep the placement job state explicit so it can be paused, cancelled, or resumed if a chunk unloads or a player leaves.
Paper'da buyuk bir leaderboard veya market menusu acarken eski async future bazen daha yeni sonuclari eziyor. Eski sonuclarin yeni GUI state'ini bozmasini nasil kesin olarak engellerim?

Her menu acilisi, filtre degisimi ve sayfa gecisinde oyuncuya ait revision sayacini artir. Async gorev bu revision degerini beraberinde tasir; sonuc geldiginde ana thread'e donup aktif menu revision'i ile karsilastirirsin. Eger oyuncu menuyu kapattiysa, farkli bir sayfadaysa veya revision degistiysa sonucu hic uygulamazsin. Bu versioned request modeli, yavas eski sorgularin hizli yeni sorgularin ustune yazmasini kesin olarak engeller.
What is the safest way to use SynchedEntityData or metadata packets for fake entities on modern Paper after Mojang mappings replaced older DataWatcher naming?

Stop writing logic directly against old obfuscated DataWatcher field names and build a tiny version-aware metadata layer around Mojang-mapped accessors instead. Define the metadata keys you need in one place, translate them through that adapter, and send metadata packets only after the spawn packet has established the entity client-side. Update metadata only when values actually change, because fake entities already require you to manually handle visibility lifecycle. This keeps packet entity code readable and much less brittle across minor updates.
Spigot veya Paper'da inventory GUI icin her menuye ayri listener yaratip kapaninca unregister yapiyorum, ama zamanla sizinti ve karmasa olustu. Daha olceklenebilir bir event management deseni nedir?

Daha saglikli desen, event kaydini kalici tutup menu state'ini gecici yapmaktir. Yani plugin acilisinda bir kez kaydolan merkezi bir GUI dispatcher, InventoryClickEvent, InventoryDragEvent ve InventoryCloseEvent olaylarini alir; oyuncunun UUID'sinden aktif menu oturumunu bulup ilgili menu nesnesine yonlendirir. Boylece her menu icin ayri listener uretilmez ve unregister unutma kaynakli sizintilar buyuk olcude biter. Dinamik listener'lar sadece gercekten tek kullanimlik gecici senaryolar icin istisna olarak kalir.
My Forge mod works in singleplayer but crashes on a dedicated server because common classes still reference renderer code or net.minecraft.client types. Where do client leaks usually hide?

They usually hide outside the obvious setup event. A common class may contain a static field, a nested class, a return type, a method parameter, or even a lambda that references a client-only type, and that is enough for the server classloader to fail. Audit every class loaded during common initialization, including registry holders, entity classes, packet handlers, and utility singletons. If a class can load on the server, it should conceptually compile without net.minecraft.client existing at all.
Skript addon'umda cancellable custom event yaziyorum. Script yazarlarinin event'i iptal etmesi ne zaman etkili olmali ve bunu nasil netlestirmeliyim?

Iptal edilebilir bir custom event tasarlarken once iptalin hangi asamada kontrol edilecegini acikca belirlemelisin. Event'i geri donulemez bir islem yapmadan once firlat, script tarafindan cancellation geldiyse ana is mantigi bu sonuca gore yol degistirsin. Ayrica event value'larini ve cancellation semantigini iyi belgele; hangi alanlarin okunabilir oldugu, event'in sync mi async mi calistigi ve iptalin hangi davranisi durdurdugu acik olmali. Belirsiz cancellation akisi, addon kullanan script yazarlarinin en cok zorlandigi noktalardan biridir.
How can I detect clicks on a packet-only NPC in Paper without ProtocolLib, while keeping the rest of my plugin on normal Bukkit abstractions?

Handle the hard part only once at the network boundary. Inject or wrap the player connection's interact packet handling so you can inspect the entity id from inbound interaction packets, compare it against your fake NPC registry, and translate a match into a normal plugin callback or domain event. The rest of your plugin can then stay on ordinary abstractions because the packet layer is responsible only for detecting that the fake entity was clicked. The important rule is to never pass the packet NPC around as though it were a real Bukkit entity.
Spigot veya Paper'da event priority ve cancellation sirasi yuzunden odul, drop veya combat mantigi bozuluyor. Bunu rastgele listener tasimadan nasil sistematik debug ederim?

Once hangi listener'in hangi priority'de ve ignoreCancelled ayariyla kayit oldugunu logla veya denetle. Ardindan yan etkileri tek bir otoriter listener'da topla; odul verme, drop degistirme veya combat state yazma gibi mutasyonlarin birden fazla listener tarafindan yapilmasi belirsizlik yaratir. MONITOR seviyesini yalnizca gozlem icin kullan ve mutasyonlari idempotent hale getir ki yanlislikla iki kez cagrilsa bile iki kez odeme yapilmasin. Sistematik bakis acisi, event akisini veri akisi gibi izlemektir.
